semantic_meaning: Designates the specific HubSpot user or Salesforce integration user responsible for managing the relationship with this contact. This is the cornerstone of lead routing, rep assignment, and ownership-based reporting.
auto_population_source: Can be set manually, via workflows, through round-robin assignment in forms, or synced from Salesforce. Not auto-populated by default.
common_uses: Lead routing: assign owners via round-robin or territory-based workflows on form submission
Permission gating: restrict record visibility to the owning rep's team
Reporting: build rep-level dashboards showing contacts owned, conversion rates, and activity
Handoff workflows: reassign ownership when lifecycle stage changes from MQL to SQL
Notification triggers: alert the owner when their contact takes a high-value action

alternatives_to_consider.when_appropriate: When you need to see all owners historically assigned, not just the current one
When you want to filter or report by the team the owner belongs to, rather than the individual owner
